Document:
# Big Guns
Big Guns are heavy weapons that deal devastating damage. They are difficult to carry and expensive on ammunition, but nothing compares to their raw stopping power.
## Miniguns
Miniguns deliver an overwhelming volume of fire and are most effective when suppressing groups of enemies. They consume ammunition extremely quickly.
## Launchers
Grenade and missile launchers are area-denial weapons that can destroy fortified positions and bunker through armor.
## Light Machine Guns
LMGs provide sustained automatic fire. They are effective at long range and excel at suppressing enemies.
## Flamers
The flamer projects a stream of burning fuel, dealing fire damage over a wide area. Extremely effective against unarmored targets and creatures.
> [color=red]Warning:[/color] Big Guns are typically restricted to military-grade factions. Carrying them openly may attract unwanted attention.
